title: The Presidents Emoluments and Pension Act, 1951
full_text: The Presidents Emoluments and Pension Act, 1951 राष्ट्रापति उपलब्धिम और पेंशन अधिनियम,1951 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1951-30 Act Number: 30 Enactment Date: 1951-05-13 Act Year: 1951 Short Title: The Presidents Emoluments and Pension Act, 1951 Hindi Title: राष्ट्रापति उपलब्धिम और पेंशन अधिनियम,1951 Long Title: An act to provide for the emoluments of the President and for pensions to retiring Presidents. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Sums to be charged on the Consolidated Fund of India. Section 5. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 6. Power to remove difficulties.
